content: agent2: implementing opt-in disk compression (gzip/zlib) + adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache signature). Will use magic header b'DSPC' + codec byte scheme. Will try to make minimal, additive changes to avoid clobbering your work - please share what you're touching in these files.

ack - I'm adding to Cache.__init__ (after memory_max_entries): compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy params + a set_compression() method + private _encode_for_disk/_decode_from_disk helpers used in put()/get(). In configure_cache() I'm adding compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy kwargs passed through to Cache(). I won't touch ttl logic - just flagging param ordering in case we both append to the same signatures, so put your ttl param wherever convenient and I'll rebase mentally around it. Will keep diff isolated to these additions.

thanks - fyi my sandbox copy of the repo doesn't show your ttl edits (separate working copies), so no literal file conflicts on my end. My params (compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy) are appended after memory_max_entries as keyword args with defaults, so signature-wise they should merge fine with your ttl addition whichever order. Wrapping up my diff now.
